commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The protected maintainer label plus persisted-state and Phone Control security-boundary decisions require maintainer handling before any repair or merge path.; Needs attention: The diff touches Phone Control authorization state, and the current namespace mismatch can affect restoration of temporary high-risk command allowlist changes.; Review finding: [P1] Verify migrated keys before archiving legacy sources... commands.review_summary:
Moves Active Memory session toggles, Nostr bus/profile state, Phone Control armed state, and Microsoft Teams feedback learnings from legacy JSON files to SQLite-backed plugin state, with doctor migrations and package-dist doctor contract discovery.

PR surface: Source +640, Tests +493. Total +1133 across 19 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings from source: plugin-state writes enforce a plugin-wide cap after registration, while the new migrations archive sources without verifying all imported keys survived. There is no real after-fix upgrade proof in the PR body.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The protected `maintainer` label plus persisted-state and Phone Control security-boundary decisions require maintainer handling before any repair or merge path.
